description: You are an environmental scientist preparing a geospatial dataset for a South American biodiversity corridor funding proposal. The proposal scope is limited to countries in South America that have significant human development pressure — specifically those with total populations exceeding 5 million people, as smaller nations lack the scale of habitat fragmentation the study addresses. Using gvSIG Desktop and the countries layer at /home/ga/gvsig_data/countries/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp, export a shapefile to /home/ga/gvsig_exports/south_america_major.shp containing only South American countries (CONTINENT field) with a population (POP_EST field) greater than 5,000,000. Ensure the exported file preserves all original attribute fields.
